parameters.content:
## WF-SLK: Slack Meeting Intake

**Purpose:** Bridges Read.ai -> Slack (#meeting-transcripts) -> WF-MCH.

**Webhook URL:** https://amadutown.app.n8n.cloud/webhook/slack-meeting-intake

**Flow:** Only events from #meeting-transcripts (C0ADFGBHJLE). Dedupe by Slack event_id via /api/slack-meeting-dedupe.

**Slack Event Subscriptions:** Request URL = n8n Cloud webhook above; subscribe to message.channels. Add bot to #meeting-transcripts.

**Dedupe:** Slack `event_id` via `/api/slack-meeting-dedupe` (Dedupe Check / Mark Processed). Read.ai recap id (`meeting_id` in payload → WF-MCH) dedupes multiple Slack messages for the same Read.ai meeting via `/api/read-ai-meeting-dedupe` + DB unique `read_ai_meeting_id`.

**Required n8n Variables:** `N8N_INGEST_SECRET` (Bearer token for API auth), `AMADUTOWN_PUBLIC_BASE_URL` (optional, defaults to https://amadutown.com). Both used by Dedupe Check, Mark Processed, and WF-MCH Read.ai Dedupe Check nodes.

### Updated 2026-04-10
Replaced hardcoded secrets with $env variables.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ meeting_id: $json.meeting_id || "", meeting_type: $json.meeting_type, client_email: $json.client_email || "", client_name: $json.client_name || "", title: $json.title, summary: $json.summary, transcript: $json.transcript, duration: $json.duration, meeting_date: $json.meeting_date, participants: $json.participants || [], action_items: $json.action_items }) }}
